story.text:
# 💡 the Agentprivacy Edge (prediction)
**concept** · shared · knowledge

The falsifiable prediction (shor_mage · THE_AGENTPRIVACY_EDGE.md): the V6 framework supplies the insight layer that beats the insight-limited frontier — four grounded axes (shared algebra 'only the AND costs' · V(π,t) as durability loss · the 9024 held-out trust gate · City-persona decomposition). Refutation test stated; publication gated on a validated leaderboard entry. Grounds on C82/C83/C87.
> *Compute opens the lever; insight chooses it.*

## Edges out

- *references* → [[C82 · The Moving Ceiling R(t)]]
- *references* → [[C83 · Compositional Leakage Amplification]]
- *references* → [[C87 · The Key Accumulates]]
